title: orthosiphon foliosus
intro: Orthosiphon foliosus, also known as Uva Ursi or Bearberry, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, which makes it effective in treating urinary tract infections and other related issues. The health benefits of Orthosiphon foliosus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve kidney function, and relieve symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH). In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
